name: Browserbase (example skeleton)
author: Symphony
description: Phase 9D SKELETON — a Tier-2 browser plugin for Browserbase (authenticated cloud Chrome). Declares the requires:network-egress + requires:secrets-read envelope and a realistic act/navigate/extract tool surface, but every handler is a non-functional stub. A real build wraps the Browserbase SDK + the cookie-sync skill so a worker can act as authenticated-you on a SaaS dashboard. See README.md.
